summary: Completed frontend-only Playwright testing of the Shyara landing page redesign. All 46 functional/UI checks passed across Hero, Social Proof, Services, Portfolio, Process, Final CTA, Footer, Navbar and mobile responsiveness. No console errors, no page errors, no horizontal overflow at 390px.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js wraps a single Landing route inside BrowserRouter/Routes — fine for now, but if no further routes are planned, the router is unnecessary overhead. Acceptable as-is.
Portfolio.jsx uses p.name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '') to derive the fake URL in the browser-chrome bar — works but could be sourced from a domain property for clarity.
All WhatsApp/external links correctly use target=_blank with rel=noopener noreferrer (good security hygiene).
All interactive elements expose data-testid attributes as required.
test_credentials: None - public landing page, no auth used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only landing at '/'. Backend is untouched template and NOT called by the frontend per E1's instruction. Verified hrefs only for wa.me/919584661610 and marketing.shyara.co.in/samples (did not navigate externally). Desktop tested at 1920x1080 and mobile at 390x844. All data-testid hooks present and stable: hero-headline, hero-badge, hero-subheadline, hero-primary-cta (#portfolio scroll verified), hero-secondary-cta (wa.me + target=_blank), social-proof-bar (50+/100+/5+), service-featured-webdev, service-webdev-link, service-card-2/3/4, portfolio-card-1/2/3, portfolio-browse-cta, process-step-1..4, final-cta-whatsapp-btn (bg #25D366), final-cta-headline, footer-email-link (mailto), footer-phone-link (tel:+919584661610), nav-whatsapp-btn, nav-link-services/work/process, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-menu.
